block_00: 3 inspiring books to read over the holidays
block_01: In this week’s article, we have collected 3 books that will guide a beginner trader through the world of finance and give them the necessary tools for good investment decisions. For example, in “One up on Wall Street: How to Use What You Already Know to Make Money in the Market” Peter Lynch shows how expertise in an unrelated to finance field can give you an advantage in trading.
block_02: Spend your Christmas and New Year’s break with a purpose: learn about trading from Peter Lynch and Jesse Livermore and enter 2022 with a full set of new skills. Check the book descriptions in the article below.
